bundleRule: Add 80% of each additional service's base range
complexityDrivers: number of entities, custom integrations, data volume, tight deadlines, limited internal resources, regulatory complexity

informationConfidence.description: Controls range width based on how much detail the prospect provided

levels.signal: Prospect gave detailed answers on scope, timeline, team, data sources
levels.effect: Narrow the range — use 30% width around tier midpoint

levels.signal: Prospect was vague on several key dimensions (team size, data sources, timeline)
levels.effect: Moderate range — use 50% width around tier midpoint

levels.signal: Prospect couldn't answer basic questions (entity count, ERP, team composition)
levels.effect: Wide range — use 75%+ width around tier midpoint, spanning into adjacent tier if needed. Note in complexity_notes that range is wider due to limited scoping detail

organizationSize.description: Pushes tier selection based on company size and structure

rules.effect: +1 tier or push to upper half of current tier
+15–25% for regulatory overhead (XBRL, SOX, audit trail)

currentStateMigration.description: Adjusts based on where the customer is coming from

rules.effect: Moderate baseline (clean slate but full build)

rules.signal: Migrating from competing platform (BlackLine, Trintech, OneStream)
Expanding existing Workiva — adding a module
Existing Workiva but poorly implemented (Health Check finding)

integrationComplexity.description: Pushes estimate up based on data and integration needs

rules.signal: Single ERP, standard connectors (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite with Workiva connector)
Custom integrations required (APIs, flat files, middleware)

internalResources.description: Adjusts based on customer team readiness and availability

rules.signal: Dedicated project team with Workiva experience
Dedicated project team but no Workiva experience
No dedicated project team — shared resources
No IT support available for integrations

timelinePressure.description: Adjusts for schedule compression and urgency

rules.signal: Comfortable timeline (6+ months, no hard deadline)
Aggressive deadline (<3 months, hard regulatory date)
"As soon as possible" with no specific deadline

regulatoryCompliance.description: Pushes estimate up for regulatory and compliance requirements

rules.signal: Standard reporting (internal management reports, board decks)

scopeVolume.description: Drives tier selection based on volume of deliverables
